query:
-- 查询结果显示有2条记录没有城市关联，这就是ID 17和18
-- 软删除这2条记录
UPDATE partners 
SET isActive = 0 
WHERE id IN (
  SELECT id FROM (
    SELECT p.id
    FROM partners p
    LEFT JOIN partner_cities pc ON p.id = pc.partnerId
    WHERE p.isActive = 1
    GROUP BY p.id
    HAVING COUNT(pc.id) = 0
  ) AS orphan_partners
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user SQg17LQaPsV51m8.32b9e2c038f9 --database jtCSa4Dgw9WMNzinVreVWF --execute -- 查询结果显示有2条记录没有城市关联，这就是ID 17和18
-- 软删除这2条记录
UPDATE partners 
SET isActive = 0 
WHERE id IN (
  SELECT id FROM (
    SELECT p.id
    FROM partners p
    LEFT JOIN partner_cities pc ON p.id = pc.partnerId
    WHERE p.isActive = 1
    GROUP BY p.id
    HAVING COUNT(pc.id) = 0
  ) AS orphan_partners
);
